SEARCH
Package bupt.ta.model

Class WorkArrangementItem

java.lang.Object
bupt.ta.model.WorkArrangementItem
public class WorkArrangementItem extends Object
One row of work arrangement on an MO job posting. Legacy JSON may only populate duration; new postings use sessionDuration + occurrenceCount.
